title: Create Aeronautics: Toolgun
description: A toolgun mod featuring a gravity gun with towing functionality, a toolgun for fast saving and printing of physical-structure blueprints, and other useful utilities.
body:
It is a tool mod made for Create: Aeronautics.


![Perfect blueprint list](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/ddca801274efb32725fd3eceafcb204d16ab36f5_0.webp)!
[Rotation and translation](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/c5ed1537f56b10ba3de2da20793ce6fe282b44a2.png)
![vehicle search](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/97aa23ae2938dd1cafa53fa570d9aa7b98710844.png)
![使用磁场枪拖拽物理结构](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/65817d116e78cfe6906a025b966872b528c877fc_0.webp)
![Survival Mode Printing](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/0faeb1abf136364bc32eacb065fde73333ba96c7.png)



Create Aeronautics: Toolgun is an expansion mod aimed at bringing a VMod-like engineering workflow into the Create Aeronautics vehicle environment, while being specifically adapted and extended around Aeronautics physical structures.

At present, the mod provides multiple tools for vehicle construction, debugging, manipulation, and a variety of practical diagnostic functions. Its core purpose is to support the saving, printing, deletion, and drag-control of Aeronautics physical structures, including structures with child physical substructures, dynamic structures, and container contents. It also adds welding and vehicle container features as usable items and mechanics.

For survival balance, the survival magnetic gun respects the balance of Aeronautics itself. It uses durability consumption to limit excessive use, avoiding a situation where players ignore normal physical handling methods such as grab handles just because they have a gravity-gun-like tool. Unlike conventional drag guns that hard-limit multi-structure dragging through mass checks, this mod instead limits the force applied to the target. As a result, large structures can still be dragged, but they may sometimes barely move at all.

Blueprint saving support is broad and designed for convenient, stable, and fast printing. Compatibility support is also included for the Synaxis and cable-control addons. Multi-structure saving and welded structure printing are fully supported, with strong performance overall.

Blueprints are stored in two locations:
Client local: game directory/enxv_aeronautics_structures/
Server side: server directory/enxv_aeronautics_server_structures/player UUID/
Can be printed using a command：/aerotoolgun print_blueprint <file> <pos>

扩展模组，目标是在航空学载具环境中提供类似 vmod 工具枪的工程操作体验，并围绕航空学的物理结构进行适配与扩展。

目前模组已经提供多种面向载具建造、调试与操作的工具功能，以及很多实用的调试功能，重点服务于包含子物理结构、动态结构、容器内容物的航空学物理结构的保存、打印、删除与拖拽控制；并新增焊接，载具容器等使用物品和功能

本模组面向生存模式的磁力枪尊重了航空学本身的平衡系统，有耐久度损耗来限制肆意使用（避免出现有了引力枪就不使用比如把手这种抓握物理体的方式） 生存模式的磁力枪并不像常规拖拽枪，用质量检测来强行限制拖拽多结构，相反的，我们采用限制施加的力来控制玩家移动大型结构（可以拖拽大结构，但可能出现纹丝不动的情况）

蓝图保存支持：基本全部支持方便稳定快速打印，附属控制学/线缆模组也兼容支持，完全支持多结构和焊接打印，性能表现很好

蓝图会保存到两个目录：
客户端本地：游戏目录/enxv_aeronautics_structures/
服务器端：服务器目录/enxv_aeronautics_server_structures/玩家UUID/
可以使用命令打印蓝图/aerotoolgun print_blueprint <file> <pos>
